LightningComponentBundle.description: Third-party Configurator Flow Screen component that displays the live state of all Data Manager @api properties and lets you publish hand-crafted valueChanged LMS events back to the Data Manager for testing and debugging.

property.name: transactionId
property.label: Transaction ID
property.description: The ID of the current sales transaction (SalesTransaction).

property.name: transactionLineId
property.label: Transaction Line ID
property.description: The ID of the current sales transaction item (SalesTransactionItem) being configured.

property.name: currentTransactionLineId
property.label: Current Transaction Line ID
property.description: The current transaction line item being processed during navigation.

property.name: parentName
property.label: Parent Name
property.description: The name of the parent product or bundle.

property.name: origin
property.label: Origin
property.description: The originating context for the configurator (e.g. cart, catalog).

property.name: headerTitle
property.label: Header Title
property.description: Title displayed in the configurator header.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency Code
property.description: ISO currency code for the active transaction.

property.name: searchResultOptionId
property.label: Search Result Option ID
property.description: Option ID returned from a product search that triggered this configuration session.

property.name: optionGroups
property.label: Option Groups
property.description: Array of option groups containing the configurable products and their attributes.

property.name: messages
property.label: Messages
property.description: Validation messages and informational notices from the Data Manager.

property.name: summary
property.label: Summary
property.description: Pricing summary including totals, discounts, and error flags.

property.name: attributeCategories
property.label: Attribute Categories
property.description: Grouped attribute definitions for the product being configured.

property.name: transactionRecord
property.label: Transaction Record
property.description: The SalesTransactionItem record being configured.

property.name: addedNodes
property.label: Added Nodes
property.description: Option groups that have been added to the configuration in the current session.

property.name: salesTransactionItems
property.label: Sales Transaction Items
property.description: All SalesTransactionItem records in the active transaction.

property.name: isDesignTime
property.label: Is Design Time
property.description: True when the component is rendering inside App Builder or Flow Builder.

property.name: isClassContext
property.label: Is Class Context
property.description: True when the configurator is operating in a product class context.

property.name: isInstantPricingToggleEnabled
property.label: Is Instant Pricing Toggle Enabled
property.description: Controls whether the instant pricing toggle is visible to the user.

property.name: isCompactLayoutEnabled
property.label: Is Compact Layout Enabled
property.description: True when the compact/condensed configurator layout is active.

property.name: isInstantPricingEnabled
property.label: Is Instant Pricing Enabled
property.description: True when prices are recalculated automatically on each change.

property.name: isProductValidationEnabled
property.label: Is Product Validation Enabled
property.description: True when real-time product validation rules are enforced.

property.name: showPrices
property.label: Show Prices
property.description: Controls whether pricing information is displayed in the UI.

property.name: isConfiguratorDisabled
property.label: Is Configurator Disabled
property.description: True when the configurator UI is in a read-only/disabled state.

property.name: isApiInProgress
property.label: Is API In Progress
property.description: True while the Data Manager is processing an async API call.

property.name: isPriceRampEnabled
property.label: Is Price Ramp Enabled
property.description: True when price ramp (time-based pricing tiers) is active for this transaction.

property.name: automaticInstantPricing
property.label: Automatic Instant Pricing
property.description: When true, automatically publishes toggleInstantPricing after LMS subscribe if instant pricing is not already enabled.
